changeSet.author: openelis

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Bacteriology Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Bacteriology Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 8

changeSet.comment: Create Reporting and Data Export page for Bacteriology Laboratory notebook

column.name: instructions
column.value: Finalize bacteriology results and export data. Generate culture result reports, antibiotic susceptibility testing (AST) reports, and QC summaries. Export data in WHONET format for AMR surveillance. Submit to REDCap or other external systems. Archive completed samples with full chain of custody documentation.

column.name: content
column.value: {"pageDescription":"Reporting and Data Export for Bacteriology","sections":[{"id":"reportGeneration","title":"Report Generation","fields":[{"name":"reportType","type":"select","label":"Report Type","options":["CULTURE_RESULTS","AST_REPORT","QC_SUMMARY","ORGANISM_SUMMARY","AMR_SURVEILLANCE","OUTBREAK_REPORT","CUSTOM"]},{"name":"reportFormat","type":"select","label":"Report Format","options":["PDF","CSV","JSON","WHONET"]},{"name":"dateRangeStart","type":"date","label":"Date Range Start"},{"name":"dateRangeEnd","type":"date","label":"Date Range End"},{"name":"includeAllSamples","type":"boolean","label":"Include All Samples"},{"name":"recipientEmails","type":"text","label":"Recipient Email(s)"},{"name":"reportNotes","type":"textarea","label":"Report Notes"}]},{"id":"dataExport","title":"Data Export","fields":[{"name":"exportFormat","type":"select","label":"Export Format","options":["WHONET","REDCAP","HL7","FHIR","CSV","JSON"]},{"name":"whonetCountryCode","type":"text","label":"WHONET Country Code"},{"name":"whonetLabCode","type":"text","label":"WHONET Laboratory Code"},{"name":"redcapProjectId","type":"text","label":"REDCap Project ID"},{"name":"recordIdField","type":"text","label":"Record ID Field"},{"name":"eventName","type":"text","label":"Event Name (for longitudinal)"},{"name":"instrumentName","type":"text","label":"Instrument Name"},{"name":"exportNotes","type":"textarea","label":"Export Notes"}]},{"id":"bacteriologyDataSummary","title":"Bacteriology Data Summary","fields":[{"name":"totalCultures","type":"number","label":"Total Cultures Processed","readOnly":true},{"name":"positiveIsolates","type":"number","label":"Positive Isolates","readOnly":true},{"name":"organismsIdentified","type":"text","label":"Organisms Identified","readOnly":true},{"name":"astCompleted","type":"number","label":"AST Completed","readOnly":true},{"name":"resistancePatterns","type":"text","label":"Resistance Patterns Detected","readOnly":true},{"name":"mdrOrganisms","type":"number","label":"MDR Organisms","readOnly":true},{"name":"qcPassRate","type":"text","label":"QC Pass Rate","readOnly":true}]},{"id":"archiving","title":"Results Archiving","fields":[{"name":"archiveLocation","type":"text","label":"Archive Location"},{"name":"archiveNotes","type":"textarea","label":"Archive Notes"},{"name":"createBackup","type":"boolean","label":"Create Backup Before Archiving"},{"name":"retentionPeriod","type":"select","label":"Retention Period","options":["1_YEAR","2_YEARS","5_YEARS","10_YEARS","INDEFINITE"]},{"name":"supervisorSignoff","type":"text","label":"Supervisor Sign-off"}]}],"systemActions":["Generate culture results report","Generate AST report with interpretation","Export data in WHONET format","Submit data to REDCap","Calculate AMR statistics","Archive results with chain of custody","Maintain full audit trail","Send email notifications"],"bulkOperations":{"enabled":true,"applyToSelected":["reportType","reportFormat","exportFormat","archiveLocation"]},"workflowCompletion":true}

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Bacteriology Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Bacteriology Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 8

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.workflow_page_template WHERE id = 308

column.name: description
column.value: Finalize bacteriology results, generate reports, and export data to external systems

column.name: default_instructions
column.value: Generate culture result reports, AST reports, and QC summaries. Export data in WHONET format for AMR surveillance. Submit to REDCap or other external systems. Archive completed samples with full chain of custody.

column.name: default_content
column.value: Reporting and Data Export - Finalize results, generate reports, export to WHONET/REDCap
